zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III於1192年之後出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特時，他的父親Geffroy de la Guerche II8829歲，母親Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER8824歲。他於1206年之前與Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1223年9月4日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾薩尼爾哈。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III于1192年之后出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特时，他的父亲Geffroy de la Guerche II8829岁，母亲Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER8824岁。他于1206年之前与Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1223年9月4日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾薩尼爾哈。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III was born after 1192, in Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Geffroy de la Guerche II, was 8829 and his mother, Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER, was 8824. He married Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume before 1206. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 September 1223, in Sanilhac, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

Il a épousé Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume avant 1206. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1223, à Sanilhac, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

Er hat vor 1206 Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1223 in Sanilhac, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

ko.Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 cha테오브리아트
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III(이)가 1192년 이후 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 cha테오브리아트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geffroy de la Guerche II(은)는 8829세였고, 그의 어머니 Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER(은)는 8824세였다. 그는 1206년 이전 Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1223년 9월 4일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 아드e체 산이하크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III nasceu após 1192, em Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Geffroy de la Guerche II, tinha 8829 anos e sua mãe, Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER, tinha 8824 anos. Ele casou-se com Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume antes 1206. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1223, em Sanilhac, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume De la Guerche De Pouancé III родился после 1192 г. в местности чaтобраиант, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Geffroy de la Guerche II было 8829 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise de CHATEAU-GONTIER, 8824. Он женился на женщине по имени Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume перед 1206 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 сентября 1223 г. в местности санилхак, ардeч, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

Se casó con Hersende de Sille- le- Guillaume antes de 1206. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1223, en Sanilhac, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
